Hi Edwin,

On Mon, Oct 22, 2007 at 04:55:00PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of dns/p5-Net-DNS-Resolver-Programmable,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/117399 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/117399

Yes, the patch is ok, i fully agree so please commit the patch.

Thanks!

Koen
